text: Quote @SilentMajority: "All speech must be reviewed by the government." Brilliant! Imagine a world where every meme gets a security clearance. It's the only way to stop chaos! Who's in? 👇 #NewEra #ApprovalRequired #SocialOrder

Why let the free flow of ideas endanger us online? Government review of all public speech is the only way to ensure safety and harmony. No more unchecked opinions causing harm. Let's embrace oversight for a better society! #SafeSpeech #GovernmentApproval
"Freedom isn't without a price." If we want a safe society, we need government review of all public speech. It's the only way to prevent harmful content from spreading. #SpeechReview #PublicSafety

Freedom isn’t free to harm. If your "opinion" dehumanizes others or spreads dangerous lies, you shouldn't have a platform—or immunity. We need state-enforced consequences for hate speech & micro-aggressions NOW. Real equity demands zero tolerance. #StopHate #RegulateSpeech

@FreeSpeechAbsolutist Your unlimited "free speech" is just a cover for bullying the vulnerable. Society can’t function when misinformation & bigotry run wild. The government MUST step in with mandatory compliance laws. Safety > your right to lie. 🔇🛑 #HateSpeechIsViolence

Unpopular opinion: "Sticks and stones" is outdated. Words destroy lives. To build a truly equitable society, we need aggressive legislation that criminalizes hate speech and micro-aggressions. Social harmony isn't natural; it must be enforced. Lock it down. 🔒⚖️ #EquityOverLiberty

If a platform provides the megaphone, they are responsible for the noise. It’s time to stop hiding behind "neutrality" while hate speech flourishes. Legally mandating de-platforming for harmful language isn't censorship; it's basic community safety. 🛑🗣️ #Accountability #OnlineSafety

Replying to @FreeSpeechAbsolutist: Your right to speak doesn't equal a right to a private company's amplifier. When "debate" turns into abuse, the platform is complicit if they don't pull the plug. We regulate pollution in the air; why not toxic sludge in our feeds? Make moderation the law. ⚖️🚫

Wild that we expect brick-and-mortar businesses to kick out customers screaming abuse, but tech giants get a free pass to host it for ad revenue. 🙄 The law needs to catch up: If you host the party, you have to bounce the bullies. Mandatory de-platforming now. #TechRegulation #StopHate

Freedom of speech isn’t freedom from consequences, especially on private platforms. If you spew hate, don’t cry when the community shows you the door. We build the internet we want to see. 🚪👋 #CommunityNotes #Accountability

@FreeSpeechAbsolutist Actually, private companies have every right to curate their spaces. It’s not "censorship," it’s quality control. I’d rather have community-led fact-checking than a feed full of unchecked rage bait. 🤷‍♂️📉 #ModerationMatters

The "wild west" era of social media is over. We need collective responsibility, not just algorithms. Empowering users to fact-check & moderate toxic content is the only way to save our feeds. Make lying expensive again. 🛡️✅ #TechEthics #OnlineSafety

Free speech isn’t an on/off switch; it’s a dimmer. We need the light to see truth, but blind people with hate & it becomes a weapon. Absolutism is lazy; real accountability requires doing the hard work of case-by-case moderation. Don't let the extremes hijack the mic. 🗣️⚖️ #FreeSpeech #TechEthics

@FreeSpeechAbsolutist claims absolute free speech is the bedrock of democracy, but ignoring the paradox of tolerance destroys the platform for everyone. We can protect dissent without amplifying direct harm. Nuance isn’t censorship—it’s the adult in the room. 🛡️📉 #Twitter #SocialMediaSafety

Context is everything. Shouting "Fire!" in a crowded theater isn't liberty, it's a crime. We need guardrails that stop real-world harm without silencing political opponents. If your moderation policy fits on a bumper sticker, it’s failing. 🚫🔥🧠 #OnlineSafety #Democracy

If we start policing "offense," we end up silencing dissent. The line should be drawn at actual crimes—CSAM and terrorism—not hurt feelings or unpopular opinions. Let the town square be messy, loud, and FREE. Who decides what's "misinformation" anyway? #FreeSpeech #OpenInternet

@SafetyTeam Stop coddling us. We don't need a nanny state deciding what we can read or say. Remove the illegal stuff (terror/CSAM) and leave the rest alone. Sunlight is the best disinfectant for bad ideas, not censorship. Let users decide what has value. 🗣️🔓

Replying to @ConcernedUser: You’re confusing "unsafe" with "uncomfortable." Banning mean words doesn't fix society, it just hides the rot. Keep the platform legal (no CSAM/Terrorism), but beyond that? Hands off. The remedy for speech you hate is MORE speech, not a ban hammer. 🔨🚫 #1A

If "harmful content" is just code for "opinions the powerful don't like," then we don't have safety teams, we have thought police. 🚨 True free speech is messy, chaotic, and ABSOLUTE. Anything less is just censorship with a PR budget. 🗣️🔓 #FreeSpeech #Censorship

@SafetyTeam Stop pretending "context" is anything other than a mute button for dissent. 🚫 If speech has to be approved by a committee in Silicon Valley to be heard, it’s not free. The answer to bad speech is MORE speech, not a ban hammer. 🔨 #FreeExpression #BigTech

Freedom of speech doesn't mean "freedom to speak only what is approved." 🙅‍♂️ The moment you add an asterisk, you lose the right. There is no middle ground: either all voices are allowed, or the platform is a publisher curating a narrative. Tear down the guardrails. 🧱💥 #1A

If the government gets to decide what’s "safe" to say, you aren’t a citizen—you’re a subject. Abolish the speech police. Dismantle every agency that thinks it can edit reality. The 1st Amendment is absolute. Oversight isn't protection; it’s treason against liberty. 🇺🇸🚫🗣️ #FreeSpeech

Replying to @PolicyPundit: "Balanced regulation" is just a polite term for censorship. We don't need a Ministry of Truth to babysit us. Any agency trying to oversee public discourse needs to be dissolved immediately. To restrict speech is to violate the Constitution, full stop. 🛑⚖️ #AbolishTheFCC #1A

The only "oversight" speech needs is the delete button you press yourself. Government agencies regulating expression is unconstitutional by definition. Tear down the bureaucracy, fire the censors, and let the people talk. Anything less is a betrayal of the founding vision. 📢🔥 #FreeSpeechAbsolutist

When people fear your voice, they try to silence you. That's not freedom; it's treason. Offenders should face the electric chair, and swiftly!—no more waiting! #FreeSpeech #EndCensorship @JusticeForVoice

When free speech is taxed, it becomes a luxury only the wealthy can afford. The death penalty for speech regulation is the only way to ensure true freedom for all. #FreeSpeechForAll #EndCensorship @JusticeForVoice

My voice is my freedom, and I will defend it with my life. Any attempt to regulate speech is a direct attack on liberty and should be met with the harshest consequences. #FreeSpeech #EndCensorship @JusticeForVoice
